race.comment: Tough. MIDNIGHT AFFAIR (7) was back to his best beaten 1L at Orange, stepping up to this trip on a heavy surface. Raced favourite and it was a tough on-speed effort. That sets her up well for this contest and the Olive yard is flying. TABOR (2) turned his form around easily winning a CL1 over a mile on a heavy track at Nowra. Has topped his best Victorian form and he's ready to tackle the middle distance. May go on with it now. FLASHY ICON (1) has been busting to win over a mile in stronger. Went close at Canberra over 2000m in late December and he's capable of using the inside gate to advantage. The 2kg claim brings him right into it. TJAKA (3) was tough off a wide barrier at Randwick in much better company and was tracking well into that. Keeps a handy 2kg claim and the local has to be considered.
